name: Databasus
tagline: Databasus is a free, open source and self-hosted tool to backup PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB.
description:
Databasus is a free, open source and self-hosted tool to backup PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB.

Docs: https://databasus.com/installation?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  databasus:
    image: databasus/databasus:v3.16.2
    volumes:
      - databasus-data:/databasus-data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -qO-
        - http://localhost:4005/api/v1/system/health
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42021:4005
volumes:
  databasus-data: null
